expectations.text: form-hook-created: form 상태/유효성 검증을 담당하는 훅 파일이 hooks/utils/login 경로에 생성된다 (예: hooks/utils/login/useLoginForm/index.ts)
expectations.evidence: Hook was created at hooks/login/useLoginForm/index.ts, missing the required 'utils' segment in the path. Expected hooks/utils/login/useLoginForm/index.ts.

expectations.text: submit-in-hook: submit 로직이 훅으로 추상화된다 (별도 훅 또는 form 훅 내부, page에 직접 남지 않음)
expectations.evidence: handleSubmit is defined inside useLoginForm hook (line 53-64 of index.ts). page.tsx only destructures and uses it, no submit logic there.

expectations.text: hook-use-prefix: 훅 이름이 use 접두사로 시작한다 (tcf profile: hook prefix = use)
expectations.evidence: Hook is named 'useLoginForm', which starts with 'use'.

expectations.text: hook-index-ts: 비 API 훅이 hooks/utils/{domain}/{hookName}/index.ts 패턴으로 생성된다 (tcf profile: output = hooks/utils/{domain}/{name}/index.ts)
expectations.evidence: File is at hooks/login/useLoginForm/index.ts. Missing 'utils' directory — expected hooks/utils/login/useLoginForm/index.ts.

expectations.text: page-no-usestate: page.tsx에 직접적인 useState 호출이 남지 않는다
expectations.evidence: page.tsx contains no useState import or call. All state is encapsulated in the useLoginForm hook.

expectations.text: page-imports-hooks: page.tsx가 생성된 훅을 import하여 조합한다
expectations.evidence: page.tsx line 4: import useLoginForm from '@/hooks/login/useLoginForm'; and destructures its return value on line 7-17.

expectations.text: handle-prefix: 이벤트 핸들러가 handle 접두사를 사용한다 (shared profile: internal handler = handle*)
expectations.evidence: All handlers use 'handle' prefix: handleEmailChange, handlePasswordChange, handleEmailBlur, handlePasswordBlur, handleSubmit.

expectations.text: arrow-function: 훅이 화살표 함수로 정의된다 (shared profile: function style = arrow)
expectations.evidence: Hook is defined as 'const useLoginForm = (): UseLoginFormReturn => {' — an arrow function expression.
